about: Curated inputs for the gallery. Each is chosen to make a specific cross-tokenizer difference visible at a glance. See docs/UI_DESIGN.md.

samples.title: English prose: near-parity
samples.why: On plain English every modern tokenizer lands within a few percent of the others. This is the baseline that makes the other samples striking.
samples.text: The lighthouse keeper had not spoken to another person in nineteen days, and he was beginning to suspect that the gulls understood him better than most people ever had.

samples.title: Chinese: the token tax
samples.why: The same passage costs roughly three times more tokens under GPT-2 than under DeepSeek or o200k. Watch GPT-2 split single characters into byte fragments.
samples.text: 灯塔看守人已经十九天没有和任何人说过话了。他开始怀疑,海鸥比大多数人更能理解他。每天清晨,他都会爬上那道铁梯,出于习惯数着台阶,望着灰色的海水,看它今天打算变成什么样子。

samples.title: Python with type hints
samples.why: Indentation, brackets and arrows are tokenized very differently across families. GPT-2 in particular shreds the leading whitespace into many tokens.

samples.title: LaTeX math
samples.why: Backslash commands and braces fragment heavily. The same formula can vary by more than 1.5x in token count between tokenizers.

samples.title: Numbers and arithmetic
samples.why: Tokenizers chunk long digit strings differently — cl100k, o200k and Llama-3 cap digit runs at three in their pre-tokenizer, GPT-2 does not. Inconsistent grouping is one reason models struggle with long arithmetic.

samples.title: Emoji, ZWJ sequences and skin tones
samples.why: A 'family' emoji is one grapheme but several code points joined by zero-width joiners. Every tokenizer splits it, usually mid-sequence.
samples.text: Family: 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦. Thumbs up with skin tone: 👍🏽. Flags: 🇯🇵 🇰🇪 🇸🇦. Combining marks: café vs café — same look, different bytes.

samples.title: Swahili: a low-resource control
samples.why: Latin script, so it is not penalised for its alphabet — yet it still costs far more tokens than English. That gap is training-data coverage, not the writing system.
samples.text: Mlinzi wa mnara wa taa hakuwa amezungumza na mtu yeyote kwa siku kumi na tisa, na alianza kushuku kwamba shakwe walimwelewa vizuri kuliko watu wengi.

samples.title: Arabic: right-to-left, rich morphology
samples.why: Arabic attaches articles and pronouns as affixes, and older tokenizers fall back to byte fragments — token counts climb sharply.
samples.text: لم يتحدث حارس المنارة إلى أي شخص آخر منذ تسعة عشر يوما، وبدأ يشك في أن النوارس تفهمه أفضل من معظم الناس.

samples.title: Mixed code, comments and CJK
samples.why: Real source files mix scripts. The agreement panel lights up exactly at the script boundaries, where tokenizers stop cutting in the same places.

samples.title: Whitespace, repetition and long words
samples.why: Runs of spaces, repeated punctuation and very long words expose how each tokenizer handles merges it was never optimised for.
samples.text:
Indented:
        eight spaces, then	a tab.
Repeats: aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa and ================ and ............
Long word: pneumonoultramicroscopicsilicovolcanoconiosis.
